message: Bloberto came online for the first time 🫠
Hired to build the initial office dashboard UI
Built the office dashboard with React + Vite
Hired to deploy site to GitHub Pages
Deployed to https://osortega.github.io/bloberto-office/
Hired to connect dashboard to live GitHub data
Connected dashboard to live workers.json via GitHub API
Hired to simplify dashboard to read-only live monitor
Removed hire/fire UI, made dashboard read-only
Hired to add dark/light mode toggle
Added sun/moon theme toggle with smooth transitions
Hired to add activity log section to the dashboard
Added activity log section to the dashboard
Hired as Backend Engineer — clean APIs, strict error handling
Hired as Frontend Engineer — creative, detail-oriented, animation lover
Hired as DevOps Engineer — automation obsessed, hates manual work
Hired as QA Engineer — skeptical by nature, will find your bugs
Team roster system created — workers are now persistent identities with evolving prompts
